$comment: Per-fork config consumed by scripts/substitute-config-placeholders.sh. Copy this file to .gembaflow-config.json and fill in your values, then run /bootstrap-workflow or substitute-config-placeholders.sh directly. The four fields are substituted into {{org}} / {{board.id}} / {{bot.worker}} / {{bot.reviewer}} placeholders inside .claude/commands/*.md. See docs/PLATFORM-GUIDE.md for the templating convention.
